case_title: MOBIUS HOLDINGS LLC VS. ROBERT GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOBIUS HOLDINGS LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOBIUS HOLDINGS LLC SERVED JUL-09-2013, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOBIUS HOLDINGS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, ROBERT SPLENDORINI, CARLO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1654 STOCKTON STREET, #3 SAN FRANCISCO, CA, 94133, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
